mapper.select:
SELECT C.ID, C.BC_NO, C.BC_REV, C.BC_TITLE, C.BC_TYP, BT.CD_NM_KO AS BC_TYP_NM, C.VD_CD, C.VD_NM, TO_CHAR(C.VALID_SD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_SD, TO_CHAR(C.VALID_ED,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_ED, C.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, C.CHRG_USR_NM, C.AUTO_RENEW_YN, C.REG_ID, CASE WHEN C.STS='ACTIVE' AND C.VALID_ED IS NOT NULL THEN TRUNC(C.VALID_ED) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) END AS DDAY_LEFT FROM BC_CONTRACT C LEFT JOIN CM_CODE BT ON BT.GRP_CD='BC_TYP' AND BT.CD=C.BC_TYP AND BT.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='BC_STS' AND S.CD=C.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE C.DEL_YN='N'
AND (C.BC_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR C.BC_TITLE LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR C.VD_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%')
AND C.STS=#{sts} AND C.VD_CD=#{vdCd} ORDER BY C.ID DESC

SELECT C.ID, C.BC_NO, C.BC_REV, C.BC_TITLE, C.VD_CD, C.VD_NM, C.CHRG_USR_NM, C.AUTO_RENEW_YN, TO_CHAR(C.VALID_SD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_SD, TO_CHAR(C.VALID_ED,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_ED, C.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, (TRUNC(C.VALID_ED) - TRUNC(SYSDATE)) AS DDAY_LEFT FROM BC_CONTRACT C LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='BC_STS' AND S.CD=C.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE C.DEL_YN='N' AND C.STS='ACTIVE' AND C.VALID_ED IS NOT NULL AND C.VALID_ED <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) + #{days} ORDER BY C.VALID_ED

SELECT C.ID, C.COMP_CD, C.BC_NO, C.BC_REV, C.BC_TITLE, C.BC_TYP, BT.CD_NM_KO AS BC_TYP_NM, C.VD_CD, C.VD_NM, C.PURC_GRP_CD, C.CHRG_USR_ID, C.CHRG_USR_NM, TO_CHAR(C.VALID_SD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_SD, TO_CHAR(C.VALID_ED,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_ED, C.PAY_COND, C.DELY_COND, C.CURR_CD, C.AUTO_RENEW_YN, C.NOTICE_DAYS, C.PREV_ID, C.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, C.REMARK, C.REG_ID FROM BC_CONTRACT C LEFT JOIN CM_CODE BT ON BT.GRP_CD='BC_TYP' AND BT.CD=C.BC_TYP AND BT.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='BC_STS' AND S.CD=C.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE C.ID=#{id} AND C.DEL_YN='N'
SELECT ID, CONTRACT_ID, LINE_NO, TERM_NM, TERM_CONTENT, REMARK FROM BC_CONTRACT_TERM WHERE CONTRACT_ID=#{contractId} ORDER BY LINE_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BC_CONTRACT (COMP_CD, BC_NO, BC_REV, BC_TITLE, BC_TYP, VD_CD, VD_NM, PURC_GRP_CD, CHRG_USR_ID, CHRG_USR_NM, VALID_SD, VALID_ED, PAY_COND, DELY_COND, CURR_CD, AUTO_RENEW_YN, NOTICE_DAYS, PREV_ID, STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{bcNo}, NVL(#{bcRev},0), #{bcTitle}, NVL(#{bcTyp},'BASIC'), #{vdCd}, #{vdNm}, #{purcGrpCd}, #{chrgUsrId}, #{chrgUsrNm}, TO_DATE(#{validSd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{validEd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{payCond}, #{delyCond}, NVL(#{currCd},'KRW'), NVL(#{autoRenewYn},'N'), NVL(#{noticeDays},30), #{prevId}, NVL(#{sts},'TMP'), #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE BC_CONTRACT SET BC_TITLE=#{bcTitle}, BC_TYP=#{bcTyp}, VD_CD=#{vdCd}, VD_NM=#{vdNm}, PURC_GRP_CD=#{purcGrpCd}, CHRG_USR_ID=#{chrgUsrId}, CHRG_USR_NM=#{chrgUsrNm}, VALID_SD=TO_DATE(#{validSd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), VALID_ED=TO_DATE(#{validEd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), PAY_COND=#{payCond}, DELY_COND=#{delyCond}, CURR_CD=#{currCd}, AUTO_RENEW_YN=NVL(#{autoRenewYn},'N'), NOTICE_DAYS=NVL(#{noticeDays},30), REMARK=#{remark}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE BC_CONTRACT SET STS=#{sts}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE BC_CONTRACT SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BC_CONTRACT_TERM (CONTRACT_ID, LINE_NO, TERM_NM, TERM_CONTENT, REMARK, REG_ID) VALUES (#{contractId}, #{lineNo}, #{termNm}, #{termContent}, #{remark}, 'SYSTEM')
